name: Seraphine

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Stage Presence
passive.description_source: Innate - Echo:  Seraphine's  basic ability casts generate  stacks of Echo. At max stacks, her next basic ability consumes them all to cast twice in quick succession.

effects.description: Innate - Echo: Seraphine's basic ability casts each generate a stack of Echo, stacking up to 2 times. At 2 stacks, Seraphine's next basic ability casts an additional time for 1 mana after a 0.033 seconds delay, consuming all Echo stacks after the cast time of the second cast.Seraphine gains maximum stacks of Echo when the game starts and upon respawning.
Innate - Harmony: Seraphine's ability casts grant a Note to herself and nearby allied champions that lasts 6 seconds, refreshes on subsequent Notes and stacks up to 4 times on each unit.

While any amount of Notes are active, Seraphine's next basic attack is empowered to have an uncancellable windup, gain 25 bonus attack range per Note, and fire all Notes at the target, with each one dealing 4 : 27.47 (based on level) (+ 4% AP) magic damage, reduced by 75% for Notes from allies.

passive.description: Innate - Echo: Seraphine's basic ability casts each generate a stack of Echo, stacking up to 2 times. At 2 stacks, Seraphine's next basic ability casts an additional time for 1 mana after a 0.033 seconds delay, consuming all Echo stacks after the cast time of the second cast.Seraphine gains maximum stacks of Echo when the game starts and upon respawning.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Echo Details: Echo's current stacks are represented by a counter under Seraphine's health bar, visible to all players.

basic_ability_1.name: High Note
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Seraphine hurls a soundwave to the target location that quickly expands upon arrival, dealing magic damage to enemies within based on their missing health.

effects.context_notes: Active: Seraphine hurls a soundwave to the target location that upon arrival expands in a radius over 0.
Against champions and monsters, the damage is increased by 0% : 75% (based on target's missing health).

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Seraphine hurls a soundwave to the target location that upon arrival expands in a radius over 0.4 seconds, dealing magic damage to enemies within the area.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): High Note uses a modified icon for the second and third stack of Stage Presence.

basic_ability_2.name: Surround Sound
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Seraphine  shields herself and nearby allied champions for a short time. She also gains a burst of  movement speed and grants allies  bonus movement speed.

effects.context_notes: Active: Seraphine grants a shield to herself and nearby allied champions for 2.
If Seraphine already had a shield at the time of cast, Surround Sound will pulse after the duration, healing herself and nearby allied champions.

effects.description: Surround Sound's shield and bonus movement speed can stack up to 2 times. Seraphine can move during Surround Sound's cast time.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Seraphine grants a shield to herself and nearby allied champions for 2.5 seconds. For the same duration, she also gains 20% (+ 2% per 100 AP) decaying bonus movement speed and grants other allies 8% (+ 0.8% per 100 AP) bonus movement speed.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Surround Sound uses a modified icon for the second and third stack of Stage Presence.

basic_ability_3.name: Beat Drop
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Seraphine fires a heavy soundwave in the target direction that deals magic damage and briefly  slows enemies hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Seraphine fires a heavy soundwave in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slows them by 99% for a few seconds.
Active: Seraphine fires a heavy soundwave in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slows them by 99% for a few seconds.
Active: Seraphine fires a heavy soundwave in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slows them by 99% for a few seconds.

effects.description: Enemies that are already slowed are also rooted for the same duration.
Enemies that are immobilized or grounded are also stunned for the same duration.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Seraphine fires a heavy soundwave in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, reduced to 70% against minions, and slows them by 99% for a few seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Beat Drop will only be empowered from slows, immobilizes, and grounding effects applied by herself or her allies.

ultimate.name: Encore
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Seraphine projects a captivating force in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, briefly  charming,  slowing, and  revealing them.

effects.context_notes: Active: Seraphine projects a captivating force in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, charms them, during which they are revealed, and slows them by 40% for a duration, increasing by 15% every 0.

Active: Seraphine projects a captivating force in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, charms them, during which they are revealed, and slows them by 40% for a duration, increasing by 15% every 0.

effects.description: Encore's projectile resets its remaining travel distance whenever it hits an allied or enemy champion, excluding Seraphine. Allied champions hit gain 4 Notes.

ultimate.description: Active: Seraphine projects a captivating force in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit, charms them, during which they are revealed, and slows them by 40% for a duration, increasing by 15% every 0.25 seconds over the duration up to 99%.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Encore has two cast times.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
